command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
SECRET="65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6"

echo "=== TEST D: Same valid mention payload but via PUBLIC URL (through CF+tunnel) ==="
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
# Capture full body during this
sudo timeout 20 tcpdump -i any -n -A -s 0 'tcp port 8080 and tcp[((tcp[12:1] & 0xf0) >> 2):4] = 0x504f5354' 2>/dev/null > /tmp/body_cap.txt &
TCPD=$!
sleep 2

curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  D (public) status: %{http_code}\n" -X POST https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: $SECRET" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":900004,"message":{"message_id":900004,"date":1749645003,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup","title":"DevilDollzllc"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"@SakuraChanAssistant_bot public url test D","entities":[{"offset":0,"length":24,"type":"mention"}]}}' --max-time 15
sleep 14
wait $TCPD 2>/dev/null

echo "  --- log after D (public) ---"
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response|skip" | tail -3

echo ""
echo "=== Did the BODY arrive via public path? (look for 'test D' or update_id in packet) ==="
grep -iE "update_id|test D|message_id|900004" /tmp/body_cap.txt 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "  body bytes captured: $(grep -c . /tmp/body_cap.txt 2>/dev/null)"
echo "  --- raw POST line + content-length ---"
grep -iE "POST /telegram|content-length|Transfer-Encoding|chunked" /tmp/body_cap.txt 2>/dev/null | head -6

sudo rm -f /tmp/body_cap.txt
REMOTE
